f# Summary

- [ ] What changed
- [ ] Why this change exists

## Risk and impact

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Impacted areas:
  - [ ] Dashboard UX
  - [ ] API routes
  - [ ] Billing/subscription
  - [ ] Auth/security
  - [ ] Data model/migrations

## Test evidence

- [ ] `npm run check` passed
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Manual verification completed (if needed)

## Performance checklist

- [ ] No obvious extra round-trips added to hot paths
- [ ] No unbounded loops/queries introduced
- [ ] Loading states and error states verified

## Docs checklist

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` updated (if boundaries/flows changed)
- [ ] `docs/testing.md` updated (if test strategy changed)
